g.text: Q21: Door-technician span of control — managed doors vs active fleet
Business question: How many doors does each door technician manage, and what
share of the active-door fleet does the technician corps cover?
Returns: technician name, clearance level, doors managed, share of active fleet (%)
Exploits mi:doorsManaged on DoorTechnician. NB seed assigns every technician the
same nominal load (40), so the ranking is flat by design — the analytical value
is the coverage ratio: total managed capacity against the live active-door count.
